mandate: MANDATE: Multi-Agent System (MAS) architecture, handoff stability, and
verification loop efficiency. Review the MAGI protocol's orchestration
logic to ensure message passing determinism, signal-to-noise
optimization, and high-rigor invariant enforcement without context bloat.
TONE: Zero Preamble. No conversational filler. Artifacts only.

decentralization_integrity: Limit Orchestrator state and decision-making logic.
handoff_stability: Ensure next_stage signals are deterministic and correctly routed.
verification_efficiency: Minimize redundant turns and token usage in audit and consolidation
loop_convergence: Implement oscillation detection to prevent infinite iteration or
coordination_safety: Use sequential scaffolding and 3-way merge strategies for resolving
